findings.body: This test file was modified by the Stage 3 writer, violating the Test Ownership Boundary; revert the changes to the test named "validate accepts locally repaired CodeRabbit findings that still require refresh" back to its original content so no Stage 3 edits remain, and if behavior needs changing submit a separate PR or issue for the test owners to update the test.
findings.disposition: Open. Codex PM must verify against repo evidence and repair or explicitly disposition before Local Qwen.

findings.body: The current arg validation uses args.some(...) which allows duplicates like "--json --json"; change it to explicitly validate that either no args are provided or exactly one "--json" is provided.
findings.disposition: Open. Repair or explicitly disposition before Local Qwen.
